  • Constructor Details

    • WatchlistMatchUpdate

      public WatchlistMatchUpdate(Optional<Boolean> excludeFromScreening, Optional<? extends WatchlistMatchUpdateMatchState> matchState, Optional<String> watchlistId, Optional<Integer> watchlistItemId)

    • WatchlistMatchUpdate

      public WatchlistMatchUpdate()

  • Method Details

    • excludeFromScreening

      public Optional<Boolean> excludeFromScreening()
      Identifies that a confirmed watchlist match can be excluded when calculating the related screen state

    • matchState

      public Optional<WatchlistMatchUpdateMatchState> matchState()
      The match state for a profile, one of: - `MATCH_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `CONFIRMED_MATCH` - Match is confirmed. - `POTENTIAL_MATCH` - Match is a potential. - `NO_MATCH` - Match is confirmed not to be a match. - `INCONCLUSIVE` - Match is deemed to be inconclusive.

    • watchlistId

      public Optional<String> watchlistId()
      Indicates the watchlist source for a given match

    • watchlistItemId

      public Optional<Integer> watchlistItemId()
      Identification number for the watchlist item that was matched

    • builder

      public static WatchlistMatchUpdate.Builder builder()

    • withExcludeFromScreening

      public WatchlistMatchUpdate withExcludeFromScreening(boolean excludeFromScreening)
      Identifies that a confirmed watchlist match can be excluded when calculating the related screen state

      public WatchlistMatchUpdate withExcludeFromScreening(Optional<Boolean> excludeFromScreening)
      Identifies that a confirmed watchlist match can be excluded when calculating the related screen state

    • withMatchState

      public WatchlistMatchUpdate withMatchState(WatchlistMatchUpdateMatchState matchState)
      The match state for a profile, one of: - `MATCH_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `CONFIRMED_MATCH` - Match is confirmed. - `POTENTIAL_MATCH` - Match is a potential. - `NO_MATCH` - Match is confirmed not to be a match. - `INCONCLUSIVE` - Match is deemed to be inconclusive.

    • withMatchState

      public WatchlistMatchUpdate withMatchState(Optional<? extends WatchlistMatchUpdateMatchState> matchState)
      The match state for a profile, one of: - `MATCH_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `CONFIRMED_MATCH` - Match is confirmed. - `POTENTIAL_MATCH` - Match is a potential. - `NO_MATCH` - Match is confirmed not to be a match. - `INCONCLUSIVE` - Match is deemed to be inconclusive.
